    16	  id?: string

    25	function FallbackIcon({ favicon }: { favicon?: string }) {
    26	  const [faviconFailed, setFaviconFailed] = useState(false)
    27	
    28	  return (
    29	    <span className={`${styles.icon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.icon}`}>
    30	      {favicon && !faviconFailed ? (
    31	        <img src={favicon} alt="" onError={() => setFaviconFailed(true)} />
    32	      ) : (
    33	        <Globe aria-hidden="true" />
    34	      )}
    35	    </span>
    36	  )
    37	}
    38	
    39	function mapSemanticClasses(classNames?: string): string {
    40	  if (!classNames) return ''
    41	  return classNames
    42	    .split(/\s+/)
    43	    .filter(Boolean)
    44	    .map((cls) =>
    45	      styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]
    46	        ? `${styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]} ${cls}`
    47	        : cls,
    48	    )
    49	    .join(' ')
    50	}
    51	
    52	export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (
    53	  props,
    54	) => {

    56	    url,

     1	import type {
     2	  LinkCardData,
     3	  LinkCardFetchContext,
     4	  LinkCardPlugin,
     5	  UrlMatchResult,
     6	} from '../../types'
     7	import { fetchJsonWithContext, generateColor, stripMarkdown } from '../../utils'
     8	
     9	export interface MxSpacePluginConfig {
    10	  webUrl: string
    11	}
    12	
    13	export function createMxSpacePlugin(
    14	  config: MxSpacePluginConfig,
    15	): LinkCardPlugin {
    16	  const webHost = new URL(config.webUrl).hostname
    17	
    18	  return {
    19	    name: 'self',
    20	    displayName: 'MxSpace Article',
    21	    priority: 10,
    22	    provider: 'mx-space',
    23	
    24	    matchUrl(url: URL): UrlMatchResult | null {
    25	      if (webHost !== url.hostname) return null
    26	      if (
    27	        !url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/') &&
    28	        !url.pathname.startsWith('/notes/')
    29	      ) {
    30	        return null
    31	      }
    32	      return { id: url.pathname.slice(1), fullUrl: url.toString() }
    33	    },
    34	
    35	    isValidId(id: string): boolean {
    36	      const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    37	      if (type !== 'posts' && type !== 'notes') return false
    38	      if (type === 'posts') return rest.length === 2
    39	      return rest.length === 1
    40	    },
    41	
    42	    async fetch(
    43	      id: string,
    44	      _meta?: Record<string, unknown>,
    45	      context?: LinkCardFetchContext,
    46	    ): Promise<LinkCardData> {
    47	      const [type, ...rest] = id.split('/')
    48	      let data: {
    49	        title: string
    50	        text: string
    51	        images?: { src: string }[]
    52	        meta?: Record<string, any>
    53	        cover?: string
    54	        summary?: string | null
    55	      } = { title: '', text: '' }
    56	
    57	      if (type === 'posts') {
    58	        const [cate, slug] = rest
    59	        data = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    60	          `posts/${cate}/${slug}`,
    61	          context,
    62	          'mx-space',
    63	        )
    64	      } else if (type === 'notes') {
    65	        const [nid] = rest
    66	        const response = await fetchJsonWithContext(
    67	          `notes/${nid}`,
    68	          context,
    69	          'mx-space',
    70	        )
    71	        data = response.data || response
    72	      }
    73	
    74	      const coverImage = data.cover || data.meta?.cover
    75	      const spotlightColor = generateColor(data.title)
    76

     1	import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2	
     3	import { plugins as builtinPlugins } from '../plugins'
     4	import type { LinkCardPlugin, PluginRegistry, UrlMatchResult } from '../types'
     5	
     6	export interface UrlMatchInfo {
     7	  plugin: LinkCardPlugin
     8	  match: UrlMatchResult
     9	}
    10	
    11	export function matchUrl(
    12	  url: string,
    13	  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,
    14	): UrlMatchInfo | null {
    15	  try {
    16	    const parsed = new URL(url)
    17	    for (const plugin of pluginRegistry) {
    18	      const match = plugin.matchUrl(parsed)
    19	      if (match) return { plugin, match }
    20	    }
    21	  } catch {
    22	    // invalid URL
    23	  }
    24	  return null
    25	}
    26	
    27	export function useUrlMatcher(
    28	  url: string | undefined,
    29	  pluginRegistry: PluginRegistry = builtinPlugins,
    30	): UrlMatchInfo | null {
    31	  return useMemo(() => {
    32	    if (!url) return null
    33	    return matchUrl(url, pluginRegistry)
    34	  }, [url, pluginRegistry])

     1	import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2	import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'
     3	
     4	import type {
     5	  LinkCardData,
     6	  LinkCardFetchContext,
     7	  LinkCardPlugin,
     8	} from '../types'
     9	
    10	export interface UseCardFetcherOptions {
    11	  source?: string
    12	  plugin?: LinkCardPlugin
    13	  id: string
    14	  fallbackUrl?: string
    15	  enabled?: boolean
    16	  context?: LinkCardFetchContext
    17	}
    18	
    19	export interface UseCardFetcherResult {
    20	  loading: boolean
    21	  isError: boolean
    22	  cardInfo: LinkCardData | undefined
    23	  fullUrl: string
    24	  isValid: boolean
    25	  ref: (node?: Element | null) => void
    26	}
    27	
    28	export function useCardFetcher(
    29	  options: UseCardFetcherOptions,
    30	): UseCardFetcherResult {
    31	  const { source, plugin, id, fallbackUrl, enabled = true, context } = options
    32	
    33	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    34	  const [isError, setIsError] = useState(false)
    35	  const [fullUrl] = useState(fallbackUrl || 'javascript:;')
    36	  const [cardInfo, setCardInfo] = useState<LinkCardData>()
    37	
    38	  const isValid = useMemo(() => {
    39	    if (!enabled || !plugin) return false
    40	    return plugin.isValidId(id)
    41	  }, [plugin, enabled, id])
    42	
    43	  const fetchInfo = useCallback(async () => {
    44	    if (!plugin || !isValid) return
    45	
    46	    setLoading(true)
    47	    setIsError(false)
    48	
    49	    try {
    50	      const data = await plugin.fetch(id, undefined, context)
    51	      setCardInfo(data)
    52	    } catch (err) {
    53	      console.error(
    54	        `[LinkCard] Error fetching ${source || plugin.name} data:`,
    55	        err,
    56	      )
    57	      setIsError(true)
    58	    } finally {
    59	      setLoading(false)
    60	    }
    61	  }, [context, plugin, isValid, id, source])
    62	
    63	  const { ref } = useInView({
    64	    triggerOnce: true,
    65	    onChange(inView) {
    66	      if (!inView || !enabled) return
    67	      fetchInfo()
    68	    },
    69	  })
    70	
    71	  return {
    72	    loading,
    73	    isError,
    74	    cardInfo,
    75	    fullUrl,
    76	    isValid,
    77	    ref,
    78	  }
    79	}

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-03-01 16:46:16Z)**_

**Findings**
1. Medium: docs still advertise a removed export, which will produce broken copy-paste imports.  
[README.md#L24](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/README.md#L24) still lists `mxSpacePlugin`, and [README.md#L52](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/README.md#L52) still treats it as built-in.

2. Low: demo runtime count is now wrong after removing the built-in plugin.  
[LinkCardPluginsPage.tsx#L90](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/LinkCardPluginsPage.tsx#L90) still uses `12 + extraLinkCardPlugins.length` (should be 11 + extras).

3. Low: several demo comments/strings still say “12 built-in plugins”, now inaccurate.  
[LinkCardPluginsPage.tsx#L27](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/LinkCardPluginsPage.tsx#L27), [LinkCardPluginsPage.tsx#L150](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/LinkCardPluginsPage.tsx#L150), [extra-linkcard-plugins.tsx#L114](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/extra-linkcard-plugins.tsx#L114).

**Checked and clean**
- `mxSpacePlugin` removal across re-export layers looks complete in code (`rich-renderer-linkcard` → `rich-renderers` → `rich-kit-shiro`).
- No remaining code imports of `mxSpacePlugin` in the affected package chain.
- `LinkCardRenderer.tsx` merge logic is coherent: extra plugins override by `name`, then merged list is priority-sorted ([LinkCardRenderer.tsx#L71](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx#L71)). No correctness issue found there.
